creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Chris, thank you.

However, I was (comment #7) and still am writing about the WWW: address from pkg-descr, not the distfile...

I only get

  "net/tcptraceroute-devel
  page is on it's way!"

Now that it's at least reachable I'll close this PR again,
but note someone else may file a new PR on the WWW: site.
